functions.body: local tmp_payload="$1" tmp_b64_local="$2" json_input_file="$3";[ -n "$tmp_payload" ] && rm -f -- "$tmp_payload" 2>/dev/null || true;[ -n "$tmp_b64_local" ] && rm -f -- "$tmp_b64_local" 2>/dev/null || true;[ -n "$json_input_file" ] && rm -f -- "$json_input_file" 2>/dev/null || true

local tmp_payload stream_json VALID_MESSAGES_JSON http_code edgecase now_ts model_from_file payload_size staged_b64 tmp_b64 content_val msgs;ensure_run_tmpdir || return "$GROQBASHERRTMP";tmp_payload="$(_mktemp_in_dir "$RUN_TMPDIR" payload.XXXXXX.json 2>/dev/null || _tmpf file "$RUN_TMPDIR" payload.json)";if is_truthy "${STREAM_MODE:-0}"; then stream_json=true; else stream_json=false; fi;case "${stream_json:-}" in true|false) ;; 1) stream_json=true ;; 0) stream_json=false ;; *) stream_json=false ;; esac;if ! printf '%s' "${TURE:-}" | grep -qE '^[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$'; then log_warn "ARGS" "invalid TURE value '${TURE:-}'; defaulting to 1.0"; TURE="1.0"; fi;if ! printf '%s' "${MAX_TOKENS:-}" | grep -qE '^[0-9]+$'; then log_warn "ARGS" "invalid MAX_TOKENS value '${MAX_TOKENS:-}'; defaulting to 4096"; MAX_TOKENS="4096"; fi;VALID_MESSAGES_JSON="";if [ -n "${JSON_INPUT:-}" ] && is_valid_json_string "${JSON_INPUT}"; then msgs="$(printf '%s' "$JSON_INPUT" | jq -c '.messages // empty' 2>/dev/null || true)"; if [ -n "$msgs" ]; then VALID_MESSAGES_JSON="$msgs"; else content_val="$(printf '%s' "$JSON_INPUT" | jq -r '.content // .prompt // empty' 2>/dev/null || true)"; if [ -n "$content_val" ]; then VALID_MESSAGES_JSON="$(jq -c -n --arg content "$content_val" '[{role:"user",content:$content}]')"; fi; fi; fi;if [ -z "$VALID_MESSAGES_JSON" ] && is_valid_json_string "${MESSAGES_JSON:-}"; then VALID_MESSAGES_JSON="${MESSAGES_JSON}"; fi;if [ -z "$VALID_MESSAGES_JSON" ] && [ -n "${BUILD_MESSAGES_FILE:-}" ] && is_valid_json_file "${BUILD_MESSAGES_FILE}"; then VALID_MESSAGES_JSON="$(jq -c '.messages // []' "$BUILD_MESSAGES_FILE" 2>/dev/null || true)"; fi;if [ -z "$VALID_MESSAGES_JSON" ] && [ -n "${CONTENT:-}" ]; then VALID_MESSAGES_JSON="$(jq -c -n --arg content "$CONTENT" '[{role:"user",content:$content}]')"; fi;if [ -z "$VALID_MESSAGES_JSON" ]; then VALID_MESSAGES_JSON='[{"role":"user","content":""}]'; log_warn "PAYLOAD" "MESSAGES_JSON invalid or missing; using fallback single empty user message"; fi;if ! printf '%s' "$VALID_MESSAGES_JSON" | jq -e 'type=="array" and (length>0)' >/dev/null 2>&1; then log_warn "PAYLOAD" "VALID_MESSAGES_JSON is empty or not an array; using fallback single empty user message"; VALID_MESSAGES_JSON='[{"role":"user","content":""}]'; fi;if [ -z "${MODEL:-}" ] && [ -n "${BUILD_MESSAGES_FILE:-}" ] && is_valid_json_file "${BUILD_MESSAGES_FILE}"; then model_from_file="$(jq -r '.model // .provider?.model // empty' "$BUILD_MESSAGES_FILE" 2>/dev/null || true)"; if [ -n "$model_from_file" ]; then MODEL="$model_from_file"; if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then log_info "PAYLOAD" "MODEL set from BUILD_MESSAGES_FILE: ${MODEL}"; fi; fi; fi;if ! jq -n --arg model "${MODEL:-}" --argjson stream "$stream_json" --arg ture "$TURE" --arg max_tokens "$MAX_TOKENS" --argjson messages "$(printf '%s' "$VALID_MESSAGES_JSON")" '{model:$model, stream:$stream, temperature:($ture|tonumber), max_tokens:($max_tokens|tonumber), messages:$messages }' >"$tmp_payload" 2>/dev/null; then log_error "PAYLOAD" "jq failed to build payload; tmp_payload not created"; rm -f "$tmp_payload" 2>/dev/null || true; return "$GROQBASHERRTMP"; fi;if [ ! -s "$tmp_payload" ]; then log_error "PAYLOAD" "tmp_payload is empty after jq; aborting"; rm -f "$tmp_payload" 2>/dev/null || true; return "$GROQBASHERRTMP"; fi;if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then payload_size=$(wc -c < "$tmp_payload" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); log_info "PAYLOAD" "tmp_payload path: $tmp_payload size=${payload_size}B"; log_info "PAYLOAD" "tmp_payload content (head 2000 chars):"; head -c 2000 "$tmp_payload" >&2 || true; fi;staged_b64="";if type stage_b64 >/dev/null 2>&1; then tmp_b64="${tmp_payload}.b64"; if stage_b64 "$tmp_b64" < "$tmp_payload" 2>/dev/null; then staged_b64="$tmp_b64"; rm -f "$tmp_payload" 2>/dev/null || true; if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then log_info "PAYLOAD" "Created base64-staged payload: $staged_b64"; fi; else if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then log_warn "PAYLOAD" "stage_b64 failed; using raw JSON payload"; fi; rm -f "$tmp_b64" 2>/dev/null || true; fi; fi;if [ -n "$staged_b64" ]; then GROQBASH_TMP_PAYLOAD="$staged_b64"; PAYLOAD="${PAYLOAD:-$staged_b64}"; else GROQBASH_TMP_PAYLOAD="$tmp_payload"; PAYLOAD="${PAYLOAD:-$tmp_payload}"; fi;return 0

}; if ! b64decode < "$tmp_payload" > "$decoded_payload" 2>/dev/null; then log_error "B64DECODE" "base64 decode failed for payload; aborting non-streaming call"; rm -f "$decoded_payload" 2>/dev/null || true; ' "${http_code:-0}" "$now_ts" > "${RESP}"; fi;rm -f "$resp_tmp" 2>/dev/null || true;rm -f "$ERRF" 2>/dev/null || true;return "${rc:-0}"

fi; fi; else if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then log_warn "CALL_STREAM" "No JSON chunks extracted from stream; writing diagnostic RESP"; fi; now_ts="$(date -u +%%Y-%%m-%%dT%%H:%%M:%%SZ)"; stderr_head="$(head -c 200 "$ERRF" 2>/dev/null | sed 's/"/\\"/g' || true)"; api_json="$(jq -c -n --argjson http "$http_code" --arg fr "${finish_reason:-}" --argjson edge "$edgecase" --arg id "${req_id:-}" --arg ts "$now_ts" '{last_http_status:$http, last_finish_reason:$fr, last_edgecase_detected:$edge, last_req_id:$id, last_time_utc:$ts}')"; ui_state_write "last_api.json" "$api_json" || { if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then log_warn "UI_STATE" "failed to write last_api.json (streaming)"; fi; }; fi;return "${rc:-0}"

if [ -n "${PROVIDER_API_ENV_groq:-}" ] && [ -n "${!PROVIDER_API_ENV_groq:-}" ]; then GROQ_API_KEY="${!PROVIDER_API_ENV_groq}"; fi;if [ -z "${GROQ_API_KEY:-}" ]; then log_error "APIKEY" "GROQ_API_KEY is required to refresh models."; return "$GROQBASHERRNOAPIKEY"; fi;ensure_run_tmpdir || return "$GROQBASHERRTMP";local workdir tmpd out errf api_url tmp_parsed tmp_trim tmpout rc;workdir="${RUN_TMPDIR:-}";[ -n "$workdir" ] || return "$GROQBASHERRTMP";tmpd="$(mktemp -d "$workdir/groq-models.XXXX")" || return "$GROQBASHERRTMP";out="$tmpd/models.json";errf="$tmpd/curl.err";resolve_provider_url "${PROVIDER:-}" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true;if [ -n "${GROQBASH_PROVIDER_URL:-}" ]; then origin="$(printf '%%s' "$GROQBASH_PROVIDER_URL" | sed -E 's#(https?://[^/]+).*#\\1#')"; api_url="${origin%/}/openai/v1/models"; else if [ "${PROVIDER:-}" = "groq" ]; then resolve_provider_url "${PROVIDER:-}" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; if [ -n "${GROQBASH_PROVIDER_URL:-}" ]; then origin="$(printf '%%s' "$GROQBASH_PROVIDER_URL" | sed -E 's#(https?://[^/]+).*#\\1#')"; api_url="${origin%/}/openai/v1/models"; else log_error "MODELREFRESH" "no provider URL available to refresh models"; rm -rf "$tmpd"; return "$GROQBASHERRAPI"; fi; else log_error "MODELREFRESH" "no provider URL available to refresh models"; rm -rf "$tmpd"; return "$GROQBASHERRAPI"; fi; fi;rm -f "$out" "$errf" 2>/dev/null || true;if ! curl "${CURL_BASE_OPTS[@]}" -H "Authorization: Bearer ${GROQ_API_KEY}" -H "Content-Type: application/json" "${api_url}?limit=${MAX_MODELS}" -o "$out" 2>"$errf"; then log_error "MODELREFRESH" "Failed to fetch models from $api_url"; if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then head -n 200 "$errf" >&2 || true; fi; rm -rf "$tmpd"; return "$GROQBASHERRAPI"; fi;if ! jq -e . "$out" >/dev/null 2>&1; then log_error "MODELREFRESH" "Invalid JSON received from $api_url"; if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then head -n 200 "$errf" >&2 || true; fi; rm -rf "$tmpd"; return "$GROQBASHERRAPI"; fi;tmp_parsed="tmpd/parsed_models.txt";: > "tmp_parsed";jq -r 'if (has("data") and (.data|type) == "array") then .data[]? | (.name // .id // empty) elif (type == "array") then .[]? | (.name // .id // empty) else empty end' "$out" | awk 'NF{print}' | sed -E 's/^[[:space:]]+//;s/[[:space:]]+$//' | sort -u > "tmp_parsed" 2>/dev/null || true;if [ ! -s "tmp_parsed" ]; then log_error "MODELREFRESH" "models refresh: parsed list empty"; if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then head -n 200 "$errf" >&2 || true; fi; rm -rf "$tmpd"; return "$GROQBASHERRAPI"; fi;tmp_trim="tmpd/parsed_trimmed.txt";awk '{ g=$0; sub(/^models\\//,"",g); sub(/^groq[:\\/-]*/,"",g); if (g ~ /^[[:alnum:]._\\/:-]+$/) print g; }' "tmp_parsed" | awk -v M="$MAX_MODELS" 'NR<=M{print}' > "tmp_trim" || true;if [ ! -s "tmp_trim" ]; then log_error "MODELREFRESH" "no valid model names after normalization"; rm -rf "$tmpd"; return "$GROQBASHERRAPI"; fi;mkdir -p "$(dirname "$MODELS_FILE")" 2>/dev/null || true;tmpout="$(_mktemp_in_dir "$(dirname "$MODELS_FILE")" 2>/dev/null)" || true;[ -n "$tmpout" ] || tmpout="$(_tmpf file "$(dirname "$MODELS_FILE")" models 2>/dev/null)";cat "tmp_trim" > "$tmpout";if ! b64_atomic_write "${MODELS_FILE}.b64" 10 < "$tmpout"; then log_error "MODELREFRESH" "failed to stage models file"; rm -f "$tmpout" 2>/dev/null || true; rm -rf "$tmpd"; return "$GROQBASHERRTMP"; fi;lockfile="$MODELS_LOCK";lock_exec "$lockfile" 10 -- base64 "${B64_DECODE_OPT}" < "${MODELS_FILE}.b64" > "$MODELS_FILE" || { log_error "MODELREFRESH" "failed to write models file under lock"; rm -rf "$tmpd"; return "$GROQBASHERRTMP"; };chmod 600 "$MODELS_FILE" 2>/dev/null || true;if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then log_info "MODELREFRESH" "Models refreshed and saved to: $MODELS_FILE (max ${MAX_MODELS})"; fi;rm -rf "$tmpd";return 0

local model="$1" norm_model file_match;[ -n "$model" ] || { printf 'groqbash: ERROR: validate_model_groq: model required
' >&2; return 1; };norm_model="$(printf '%%s' "$model" | sed -e 's#^models/##' -e 's#^groq[:/ -]*##' -e 's/^[[:space:]]*//;s/[[:space:]]*$//')";if [ -f "${MODELS_FILE:-}" ] && [ -s "${MODELS_FILE:-}" ]; then if grep -x -F -q "$model" "$MODELS_FILE" 2>/dev/null; then file_match=1; else if awk '{g=$0; sub(/^models\//,"",g); sub(/^groq[:\/ -]*/,"",g); print g}' "$MODELS_FILE" | grep -x -F -q "$norm_model" 2>/dev/null; then file_match=1; else file_match=0; fi; fi; if [ "file_match" -ne 1 ]; then printf 'groqbash: ERROR: The model "%%s" is not present in %%s
' "$model" "$MODELS_FILE" >&2; return 1; fi; fi;if ! is_supported_model "$norm_model"; then printf 'groqbash: ERROR: The "%%s" model is not supported by GroqBash (requires non-text input).
' "$model" >&2; return 1; fi;return 0

local file="$MODELS_FILE" line norm cnt=0;if [ -f "$file" ] && [ -s "$file" ]; then while IFS= read -r line || [ -n "$line" ]; do [ -z "$line" ] && continue; cnt=$(($cnt+1)); norm="$(printf '%%s' "$line" | sed -e 's#^models/##' -e 's#^groq[:/ -]*##' -e 's/^[[:space:]]*//;s/[[:space:]]*$//')"; if is_supported_model "$norm"; then printf '%%s' "$norm"; return 0; fi; [ "$cnt" -ge "${MAX_MODELS}" ] && break; done < "$file"; fi;return 1

blocks.body: if [ -n "${PROVIDER_API_ENV_groq:-}" ]; then if [ -n "${!PROVIDER_API_ENV_groq:-}" ]; then GROQ_API_KEY="${!PROVIDER_API_ENV_groq}"; fi; fi
